summary: Kept #53698 as the live canonical issue for the hardcoded 30-minute WhatsApp watchdog/configurability defect. Planned only high-confidence duplicate closeouts for #55138, #63854, #63925, #65215, #66965, #70608, and #70678. Left the remaining WhatsApp reconnect/logout/message-loss/network reports open as related or independent because the hydrated artifact points to different root-cause families. No merge is safe: linked PR #63939 still has failing checks, and linked PR #67816 is marked security-sensitive and is out of ProjectClownfish scope.
